label: GDP Nominal (2024)
source: World Bank / IMF World Economic Outlook 2024

label: Named Islands
contestNote: Indonesia has officially registered 17,504 named islands; earlier counts cited 17,000 or 13,000+ depending on methodology

label: Years of Dutch Colonial Rule
source: VOC establishment 1602 to Indonesian sovereignty December 27, 1949
contestNote: Some historians argue effective Dutch rule began later (1619 Batavia, 1830 Java) and that full territorial control was only achieved in the early 20th century

label: Estimated 1965–66 Killings
source: Komnas HAM 2012 Report; Cribb, R. (ed.) scholarly estimates
contestNote: Government has never acknowledged the full scale; New Order official figure was ~78,000. Independent scholars estimate 500,000–1,000,000. Komnas HAM classified the killings as crimes against humanity in 2012.

label: EIU Democracy Index Score
contestNote: Classified as 'flawed democracy' (rank 56/167). Civil society groups argue the 2024 election constitutional court manipulation and military dual-function restoration under Prabowo warrant downgrade.
